privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic Magento wholesale tier pricing task. The task requires: (1) creating a customer group named 'Wholesale Buyers' with Retail Customer tax class, (2) adding tier pricing to three pre-existing products (LAPTOP-001, HEADPHONES-001, BOTTLE-001), and (3) assigning customer john.smith@example.com to the group. The tier pricing structure specifies 6 quantity-based pricing tiers across the three products: LAPTOP-001 at quantities 5 and 10; HEADPHONES-001 at quantities 10 and 25; BOTTLE-001 at quantities 50 and 100. All data is defined within the task itself and verified against the task description.
